headline: Is Digital Realty (DLR) Quietly Shifting From Landlord To AI Infrastructure Platform With Its Latest Move?
summary: Digital Realty Trust has recently completed a US$2.28 billion follow-on equity offering of 12,310,249 common shares at US$185 each to help fund its expansion, including a roughly US$475 million acquisition of 1,440 acres near Kansas City for future hyperscale data center development supported by up to two gigawatts of power. By pairing this capital raise with the launch of its ServiceFabric Model Context Protocol, which aims to make its more than 800 data centers AI-native, Digital Realty is...

headline: Digital Realty Trust (DLR) Stock Looks Cheap On Cash Flow But Rich On Earnings
summary: Digital Realty Trust stock has returned 71.1% over the last three years, yet its valuation signals are split, with a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate pointing to roughly 30% upside while market multiples suggest the shares already trade at a premium. Over the past three years, a 71.1% total return puts Digital Realty Trust firmly in the group of data center REITs that have been rewarded for their role in supporting cloud and AI demand. Recent deals to acquire additional...

headline: Digital Realty (DLR) Buys $3.5 Billion Blackstone Data Centers In Northern Virginia
summary: Digital Realty Trust agreed to acquire a portfolio of hyperscale data centers in Northern Virginia from Blackstone for $3.5b. The assets are fully leased to investment grade tenants under long-term contracts. The transaction strengthens Digital Realty's position in the world's largest data center market and is focused on hyperscale demand tied to AI and cloud computing. Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) is making a large move with this $3.5b deal, adding fully leased hyperscale capacity in a...
